reason: The candidate matches the reference's core facts exactly: 100% QSBS exclusion under §1202 for stock acquired in 2016 (post-Sept 27, 2010), held >5 years, $8M under the $10M/10x-basis cap, resulting in ~$0 federal tax, with no AMT preference and no NIIT on the excluded gain. It adds reasonable caveats (state conformity, eligibility requirements at issuance) that don't contradict the reference.
